shellCommands.command: cd /home/user/workspace && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200
cd /home/user/workspace && cat package.json && echo '---' && cat README.md && echo '---' && cat AGENTS.md
cd /home/user/workspace/vectorops && python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip build pypiserver
cd /home/user/workspace/vectorops && . .venv/bin/activate && python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]); print('ok')"

cd /home/user/workspace/vectorops && mkdir -p /home/user/workspace/vectorops/packages && cp dist/*.whl /home/user/workspace/vectorops/packages/ && cp dist/*.tar.gz /home/user/workspace/vectorops/packages/ && nohup .venv/bin/pypi-server run -p 8080 /home/user/workspace/vectorops/packages >/tmp/vectorops-pypiserver.log 2>&1 & echo $!

cd /home/user/workspace/vectorops && python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-install-test && /tmp/vectorops-install-test/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /tmp/vectorops-install-test/bin/python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]); print(dotproduct([1,2,3],[4,5,6]))"

cd /home/user/workspace/vectorops && rm -rf /tmp/vectorops-pypi && mkdir -p /tmp/vectorops-pypi/simple/vectorops /tmp/vectorops-pypi/packages && cp dist/* /tmp/vectorops-pypi/packages/ && for f in /tmp/vectorops-pypi/packages/*; do bn=$(basename "$f"); echo "$bn
"; done > /tmp/vectorops-pypi/simple/vectorops/index.html && cat > /tmp/vectorops-pypi/simple/index.html <<'EOF' vectorops EOF nohup python3 -m http.server 8080 --directory /tmp/vectorops-pypi >/tmp/vectorops-http.log 2>&1 & echo $!
sleep 1; curl -I http://localhost:8080/simple/ && curl -s http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ | head

cd /home/user/workspace/vectorops && python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-install-test && /tmp/vectorops-install-test/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /tmp/vectorops-install-test/bin/python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]); print(dotproduct([1,2,3],[4,5,6]))" && cd /home/user/workspace && npm run build
cd /home/user/workspace/vectorops && . .venv/bin/activate && python -m build && cd /home/user/workspace && PATH=/home/user/workspace/vectorops/.venv/bin:$PATH npm run build
cd /home/user/workspace && npm run build && curl -s http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ | grep -q 'vectorops-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl' && echo 'server_ok'

cd /home/user/workspace && PATH=/home/user/workspace/vectorops/.venv/bin:$PATH npm run build && python3 - <<'PY'
import urllib.request
print(urllib.request.urlopen('http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/').read().decode())
PY

cd /home/user/workspace/vectorops && python3 -m venv /tmp/vectorops-install-test2 && /tmp/vectorops-install-test2/bin/pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && /tmp/vectorops-install-test2/bin/python -c "from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1],[0,1]); print('installation_verified')"
